askAI.subtitle: How can I help you today?

responses.greeting: Hello! I'm your AI assistant, glad to serve you. I can help answer questions, provide advice, or assist with various tasks. How can I help you?
responses.help:
I can provide the following assistance:
1. Answer questions: I can answer various knowledge-based questions
2. Text processing: Help you edit, summarize, or translate text
3. Creative suggestions: Provide creative ideas and advice
4. Technical support: Answer technical questions
Please let me know what you need help with?
responses.features:
My main functions include:
• Intelligent Q&A: Answer various questions
• Text analysis: Analyze, summarize, and extract key information
• Content generation: Generate articles, summaries, etc.
• Multilingual support: Support communication in multiple languages
• Context understanding: Understand conversation context and provide coherent responses
Which function would you like to know more about?
responses.default:
Based on your question "{question}", I've prepared the following content:
This is a sample response showing the format of AI replies. In actual applications, I will provide more detailed and accurate answers based on your specific questions.
If you have any other questions, please feel free to continue asking. I will do my best to help you.

sidebarSuggestedQuestions.question1: Besides the Huasheng Project, are there any other projects in progress?
sidebarSuggestedQuestions.question2: Is there any other communication method more effective than email?
sidebarSuggestedQuestions.question3: How to determine the specific intermediate values for equipment parameter adjustment?
sidebarSuggestedQuestions.question4: How is project progress tracked and managed?
sidebarSuggestedQuestions.question5: What are the best practices for team collaboration?
